channel.title: Da Nang Language Exchange Club
channel.description: Recent content on Da Nang Language Exchange Club

item.title: Topic 3: Work & Study
item.description: Talk about your job, your studies, and your daily routine.

item.title: Topic 2: Travel & Places
item.description: Share your travel stories and favorite places to visit in Vietnam.

item.title: Topic 1: Food & Dining
item.description: Discuss your favorite local and international dishes.

item.title: Icebreaker Question Cards
item.description: Printable cards with 50 fun, low-pressure questions to start a conversation with anyone. Available in both English and Vietnamese.

item.title: Common Cafe Vocabulary
item.description: Learn how to order coffee, tea, and ask for the WiFi password in Vietnamese and English.

item.title: Basic Vietnamese Greetings
item.description: A simple, printable 1-page guide on how to say hello, ask “how are you?”, and introduce yourself in Southern Vietnamese. Great for complete beginners.

item.title: About
item.description:
Welcome to the Da Nang Language Exchange Club! We are a friendly community built around real, in-person language practice in Da Nang, Vietnam.

Our Mission

We believe the best way to learn a language is by speaking it. Our goal is to connect foreigners who want to practice Vietnamese with locals who want to practice English in a structured, beginner-friendly environment.

Who is it for?

  • Foreigners living in or visiting Da Nang who want to learn or practice Vietnamese.
  • Vietnamese locals who want to improve their spoken English.
  • Beginners looking for structured practice materials.
  • Advanced speakers looking for engaging conversations.

Why join us?

Unlike generic meetup groups or tourist-focused parties, our club focuses on intentional language exchange. We provide:

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Have questions about the club? Want to suggest a venue or a future topic?

The best way to reach us is by joining our Zalo or WhatsApp groups and messaging the admins directly.

Alternatively, you can email us at: hello@dananglanguageexchange.local (Placeholder)

Follow us on social media:

  • Facebook (Placeholder)
  • Instagram (Placeholder)

item.title: Join Us
item.description:
Welcome! Joining the Da Nang Language Exchange Club is free and easy. All our event locations and weekly topics are announced in our community chat groups.

Who This Is For

We are a community of serious learners who want to practice conversational Vietnamese and English in a structured, friendly environment. Whether you are a complete beginner or fluent, you are welcome here.

Prepare for Your Next Meetup

Check out our resources to get ready for the next weekly cafe session!
